# doit_sharing (Data Source)

Manage permissions associated with specified Cloud Analytics resources.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up sharing permissions for an existing report
data "doit_sharing" "report" {
  resource_type = "reports"
  resource_id   = "your-report-id"
}

# Use the permissions data in other resources or outputs
output "report_permissions" {
  value = data.doit_sharing.report.permissions
}

output "report_public_access" {
  value = data.doit_sharing.report.public
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `resource_id` (String) Resource ID. See [Resource IDs](https://developer.doit.com/docs/resource-ids).
- `resource_type` (String) Resource type.
Possible values: `alerts`, `budgets`, `reports`, `allocations`

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (Number) The time when this resource was created, in milliseconds since the epoch.
- `description` (String) Resource description.
- `id` (String) Resource ID.
- `name` (String) Resource name.
- `permissions` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--permissions))
- `public` (String) Type of permissions users in the entire organization have for this resource
- `update_time` (Number) The time when this resource was last updated, in milliseconds since the epoch.

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).


<a id="nestedatt--permissions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `permissions`

Read-Only:

- `role` (String) The role assigned to the user, defining their level of access to the resource.
- `user` (String) The email address of the user to whom the role is assigned.
